stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
We are departing Valence (LFLU, N44°55' E004°58′) and intend to join airway B16 southbound. What frequency will be used when overflying the MTL VOR to join B16?

options.a: We initially contact Marseille on 123.9, and when over the VOR we switch to Marseille on 128.32.
options.b: We initially contact Marseille on 126.705, and when over the VOR we switch to Marseille on 123.9.
options.c: We initially contact Marseille on 128.32, and when over the VOR we switch to Marseille on 123.9.
options.d: We remain with Marseille on 128.32 for the entire route.
